question: Buat YAML untuk Deployment nginx dengan 3 replika menggunakan image nginx:latest

ground_truth.answer:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nginx-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nginx
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nginx
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nginx
        image: nginx:latest
context: io.k8s.api.apps.v1.Deployment: Deployment enables declarative updates for Pods and ReplicaSets.
io.k8s.api.apps.v1.DeploymentSpec: replicas, selector, and template are core fields
